mapper.sql: id, item_id, name, name_cn, category, sub_category, quality, rarity, exterior, icon_url, inspect_link_template, steam_market_url, buff_price, is_active, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM item WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO item ( item_id, name, name_cn, category, sub_category, quality, rarity, exterior, icon_url, inspect_link_template, steam_market_url, buff_price, is_active, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{itemId}, #{name}, #{nameCn}, #{category}, #{subCategory}, #{quality}, #{rarity}, #{exterior}, #{iconUrl}, #{inspectLinkTemplate}, #{steamMarketUrl}, #{buffPrice}, #{isActive}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM item WHERE category = #{category} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT
FROM item WHERE exterior = #{exterior} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT
FROM item WHERE quality = #{quality} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT
FROM item WHERE is_active = 1 AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name_cn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT DISTINCT category FROM item WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY category
SELECT DISTINCT exterior FROM item WHERE is_active = 1 AND exterior IS NOT NULL ORDER BY exterior
SELECT DISTINCT quality FROM item WHERE is_active = 1 AND quality IS NOT NULL ORDER BY quality

SELECT
FROM item ORDER BY created_at DESC
